current_wind.description: Moderate to strong wind from the southwest, with significant gusts.

wind_info.description: Moderate to strong crosswind from the right.

bh.shot_strategy: Controlled hyzer or flex shot to counter wind. Avoid exposing the underside.

fh.shot_strategy: Controlled straight flight or slight hyzer, playing with the wind.

bh.shot_strategy: Straight flight or slight anhyzer, letting the wind assist.

fh.shot_strategy: Controlled straight flight or slight hyzer.
